reply:
[[BLOCK:slide57_shape0]]
• JASP can read comma-delimited files (CSV) and SPSS files (SAV), but it does not support Excel files.  
• You can open the data file by navigating to File: Open, or by right-clicking on the file and selecting “open with JASP.”  
• Select Regularized Linear Regression (Regularized Linear Regression) from the Machine Learning menu.  
• Enter Y into the Target field.  
• Enter Age, BMI, BP, TotalCholesterol, LDL, HDL, TCH, TCH, LTG, and Glucose into the Features field.  
• Check the options for Regression Coefficients, Data split, and Predictive performance.
